creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
I get check-plist failures here:

====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: bin/demo
Error: Orphaned: bin/microspdy2http
Error: Orphaned: include/microspdy.h
Error: Orphaned: lib/libmicrospdy.a
Error: Orphaned: lib/libmicrospdy.la
Error: Orphaned: lib/libmicrospdy.so
Error: Orphaned: lib/libmicrospdy.so.0
Error: Orphaned: libdata/pkgconfig/libmicrospdy.pc
